code:
import io
import string
import list

let text = io.read_to_end()
let tokens = string.split_whitespace(text)
mut seen_hashes: List<Int> = []
mut count = 0
mut i = 0
while i < tokens.len()
  let tok = match tokens.get(i)
  when Some(t)
    t
  when None
    ""
  end
  mut h = 0
  mut j = 0
  let n = string.len(tok)
  while j < n
    let b = match string.byte_at(tok, j)
    when Some(x)
      x
    when None
      0
    end
    h = h * 131 + b
    j = j + 1
  end
  h = h * 1000003 + n
  if not list.contains(seen_hashes, h)
    seen_hashes = list.push(seen_hashes, h)
    count = count + 1
  end
  i = i + 1
end
println("unique=#{count}")
